name: Pineapple Mac Nut Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Unsalted butter, plus two tablespoons melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve 1/4 cup of the juice.
2. Set the pineapple and juice aside.
3. Combine vanilla wafer crumbs, butter, brown sugar, and vanilla extract; stir well.
4. Firmly press the crumb mixture onto the bottom of a 10-inch springform pan.
5. Brush with egg white and bake at 350 degrees F for 10 minutes. Set aside.
6. Beat cream cheese until light and fluffy using an electric mixer.
7. Gradually add 2/3 cup sugar, beating well after each addition.
8. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
9. Stir in 1/4 cup rum and 1 teaspoon vanilla extract.
10. Fold in reserved pineapple, coconut, and macadamia nuts.
11. Pour batter into the prepared pan and bake at 350 degrees F for one hour.
12. Remove cheesecake from the oven; increase temperature to 450 degrees F.
13. Beat sour cream at medium speed for 2 minutes.
14. Add reserved pineapple juice, 1/4 cup plus 2 tablespoons sugar, and 1 tablespoon rum; beat for 1 minute.
15. Spread mixture on top of cheesecake and bake at 450 degrees F for 5 minutes.
16. Turn off the oven. Partially open the oven door and let the cheesecake cool in the oven for 1 hour.
17. Let cool to room temperature on a wire rack; chill at least 2 hours.
18. Carefully remove sides of the springform pan.
